languages.text: {n}Зычный голос блюстителя командует в пустоту:{/n} "Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Знамя династии — на-а-аша перина и саван... Хочешь в кар-р-рцер?!" {n}По телу проходит спазм и его и так бессвязная речь превращается в пугающую какофонию звуков, в которых едва угадываются слова. Вдруг Триасомата вновь бьется головой о палубу и выдает еще порцию обрывистых фраз:{/n} "Прошу... прошу, ве-е-рнись живой. Где шлем, со-о-олдат? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, я не убоюсь! Я не убоюсь..." {n}Спазм повторяется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Зычный голос блюстителя командует в пустоту:{/n} "Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Где шлем, со-о-олдат? Хочешь в кар-р-рцер?! Знамя династии — на-а-аша перина и саван... Прошу... прошу, ве-е-рнись живой. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, я не убоюсь! Я не убоюсь..."
traits.speaker: Amalgam_Fresh

languages.text: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Хочешь в кар-р-рцер?!" {n}По телу проходит спазм и его и так бессвязная речь превращается в пугающую какофонию звуков, в которых едва угадываются слова. languages.text: {n}強制執行官の轟くような声が、虚空に向かって命じる。{/n}「チ…武器庫を確認しろ！王朝の旗は俺たちの夜具にして死装束…貴様を牢にぶち込んでほしいのか？」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「どうか…どうか…生きて帰ってきてくれ。ヘルメットはどこだ、兵士よ？{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、私は恐れません！恐れません…」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}強制執行官の轟くような声が空虚な空間に響く:{/n}「チ... 武器庫を確認しろ！ ヘルメットはどこだ、兵士？ 牢に閉じ込めたいのか？ 王朝の旗は俺たちの毛布と死装束だ... どうか... どうか... 生き帰ってきてくれ。神皇帝、俺は怖くない！ 怖くない...」

{n}強制執行官の轟くような声が、虚空に向かって命じる。{/n}「チ…武器庫を確認しろ！王朝の旗は俺たちの夜具にして死装束…貴様を牢にぶち込んでほしいのか？」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「どうか…どうか…生きて帰ってきてくれ。ヘルメットはどこだ、兵士よ？{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、私は恐れません！恐れません…」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}

languages.text: {n}执法者用雷鸣般的声音对着空气发号施令：{/n}“检……检查军械库！王朝的旗帜是我们安息的床褥和裹尸布……你想让我关你禁闭吗？”{n}他的身体剧烈抽搐，那本就支离破碎的言语化作一片骇人的杂音，几不成语。突然，三相体再次用头撞击甲板，迸出一串支离破碎的句子：{/n}“求求你……求求你……活着回来。你的头盔呢，士兵？{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，我无所畏惧！我无所畏惧……”{n}抽搐再次发作。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}执法者用雷鸣般的声音对着空气发号施令：{/n}“检……检查军械库！王朝的旗帜是我们安息的床褥和裹尸布……你想让我关你禁闭吗？”{n}他的身体剧烈抽搐，那本就支离破碎的言语化作一片骇人的杂音，几不成语。突然，三相体再次用头撞击甲板，迸出一串支离破碎的句子：{/n}“求求你……求求你……活着回来。你的头盔呢，士兵？{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，我无所畏惧！我无所畏惧……”{n}抽搐再次发作。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le prévôt lance des ordres d'une voix tonitruante.{/n} « Vé... vérifiez l'aaarsenal ! La bannière de la dynastie est noootre duvet et notre linceul... Vous voulez que je vous jette en cellule ? » {n}Un spasme secoue son corps, et son discours confus se transforme en une cacophonie effrayante, à peine articulée. Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe de nouveau la tête sur le pont, et éructe une nouvelle série de phrases décousues.{/n} « Je vous en prie... reveneeeez en vie. Où est votre casque, soooldat ? Par l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, je n'aurai pas peur ! Je n'aurai pas peur... » {n}Les spasmes continuent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe à nouveau la tête sur le pont, et éructe une nouvelle série de phrases décousues.{/n} « Je vous en prie... reveneeeez en vie. Où est votre casque, soooldat ? Par l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, je n'aurai pas peur ! Je n'aurai pas peur... » {n}Les spasmes continuent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La voz atronadora del guardia da órdenes a la nada:{/n} «Com... ¡Comprobar el arsenaaal! El estandarte de la dinastía es nuestro edredón y nuestra mortaja... ¿Quieres acabar en el calabozo?». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofonía que apenas se asemeja a un idioma. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Por favor... por favor... vuelve de una pieza. ¿Dónde está tu casco, soldadooo? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, ¡no temeré! No temeré...». {n}El espasmo se repite.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

El estandarte de la dinastía es nuestro edredón y nuestra mortaja... ¿Quieres acabar en el calabozo?». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofonía que apenas se asemeja a un idioma. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Por favor... por favor... vuelve de una pieza. ¿Dónde está tu casco, soldadooo? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, ¡no temeré! No temeré...». {n}El espasmo se repite.{/n}

El estandarte de la dinastía es nuestro edredón y nuestra mortaja... ¿Quieres acabar en el calabozo?». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofonía apenas comprensible. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Por favor... por favor... vuelve de una pieza. ¿Dónde está tu casco, soldadooo? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, ¡no temeré! No temeré...». {n}El espasmo se repite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnfazcının gür sesi boşluğa emirler yağdırıyor.{/n} "Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Hanedanlığın sancağı biiizim yorganımız ve kefenimizdir... Seni hücreye atmamı mı istiyorsun?" {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, dili pek andırmayan korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Lütfen... Lütfen... Canlı döööön. Kaskın nerede aaaasker? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, korkmayacağım! Korkmayacağım..." {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}

Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Seni hücreye atmamı mı istiyorsun?" {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, dili pek andırmayan korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Lütfen... Lütfen... Canlı döööön. Kaskın nerede aaaasker? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, korkmayacağım! Korkmayacağım..." {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}

{n}İnfazcının gür sesi boşluğa emirler yağdırıyor.{/n} "Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Hanedanlığın sancağı biiizim yorganımız ve kefenimizdir... Seni hücreye atmamı mı istiyorsun?" {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, artikülasyona zar zor benzeyen korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Lütfen... Lütfen... Canlı döööön. Kaskın nerede aaaasker? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, korkmayacağım! Korkmayacağım..." {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die dröhnende Stimme des Enforcers erfüllt den Raum:{/n} "Ü... überprüft das Arsenaaaal! Das Banner der Dynastie ist unser Daunenbett und Grabtuch ... Wollt Ihr, dass ich Euch in eine Zelle werfe?" {n}Sein Körper wird von einem Krampf geschüttelt und seine ohnehin schon verwaschenen Worte verwandeln sich in eine verstörende Kakophonie ohne jede Artikulation. Plötzlich schlägt der Triasomata erneut seinen Kopf auf das Deck und speit eine weitere Sequenz abgehackter Sätze aus:{/n} "Bitte ... bitte ... kommt lebeeendig zurück. Wo ist Euer Helm, Soooldat? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g}, ich werde keine Angst haben! Ich werde keine Angst haben ..." {n}Er wird erneut von einem Krampf geschüttelt.{/n}

Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
